name: openclaw-barbershop
description: AI-powered barbershop & salon management tools — appointment scheduling, client management, service catalog, walk-in queues, SMS reminders, and performance analytics.

tools.name: manage_appointments
tools.description: Book, reschedule, cancel, check-in appointments. View today's schedule.

tools.name: manage_clients
tools.description: Client profiles, preferences, visit history, search and registration.

tools.name: manage_services
tools.description: Service catalog — pricing, duration, categories, staff assignment.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Find open time slots by date, barber, and service type.

tools.name: manage_walkins
tools.description: Walk-in queue management — add, view queue, call next, wait estimates.

tools.name: send_reminders
tools.description: SMS appointment reminders, follow-ups, birthday offers, promo messages.

tools.name: shop_analytics
tools.description: Revenue, staff performance, client retention, business KPI reports.
